name: SOC Cortex Xpanse Posture
description: Cortex Xpanse vendor pack for the SOC Framework Posture lifecycle on Cortex XSIAM 3.x. Reshapes attack-surface issues from the unified `issues` dataset (filtered by xdm.issue.detection.method = XPANSE) into SOC Framework Posture-category passthrough alerts, dispatching through EP_Posture for Identify/Plan/Execute/Verify phase handling under posture_misconfig category.
author: Palo Alto Networks
